heading: Today
text: Rain showers becoming spotty into the afternoon with some pockets of sunshine developing. Highs from the upper 50s to near 60 northeast of Interstate 89, increasing into the low to mid 60s west and south. South wind at 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 30 mph along Lake Champlain.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy. Chance of a few passing rain showers through the evening. Mild. Lows from the mid 30s to near 40 in the north, increasing into the mid to upper 40s in the south. Southwest wind at near 10 mph, occasionally gusting 15 to 20 mph.

heading: Saturday
text: Some pockets of sunshine in the morning, then increasing cloud cover in the afternoon with a chance of showers arriving from the west. Highs in the 50s to near 60 north of Route 4, into the low to mid 60s south. Light and variable wind.
